hero.kicker: Personal Life & Wellness · Ansiversa mini app
hero.title: Medicine Reminder
hero.description: Organize medicines, reminder schedules, dose history, and refill notes in one focused Ansiversa workspace.

flow.title: Medicine -> Schedule -> Log -> Review
steps: Log dose outcomes and review history

differences.title: Keep medicine routines organized without medical advice claims
differences.description: Medicine Reminder focuses on user-entered medicine records, schedules, dose logs, and notes.

items.title: Medicine details
items.description: Store dosage, form, purpose, instructions, status, and refill reminder context.

items.title: Schedule structure
items.description: Create reminder schedule records for the medicines users already saved.

items.title: History and review
items.description: Record taken, missed, skipped, and late doses alongside notes for review.

feel.title: A calm routine workspace
feel.description: The workflow keeps setup, schedule, history, and review separate but connected.

items.title: Create the record
items.description: Start with the medicine and its instructions.

items.title: Add the schedule
items.description: Define when the routine should be tracked.

items.title: Review the week
items.description: See recent dose logs and refill watch signals.

audiences.title: Who uses Medicine Reminder
audiences.description: Useful for people who need a private medicine routine organizer inside Ansiversa.

items.title: Individuals
items.description: Track personal medicine routines and refill notes.

items.title: Caregivers
items.description: Organize a family member routine without clinical claims.

items.title: Appointment planners
items.description: Keep notes and questions ready for pharmacy or doctor conversations.

resourceSection.title: Medicine Reminder essentials

groupedSection.title: A practical medicine reminder workflow
groupedSection.description: Move from setup to repeatable tracking and review.

items.name: Insights
items.description: Review active routines and refill watch signals.

technicalSection.title: Aligned with the Ansiversa platform model
technicalSection.description: Medicine Reminder follows the shared mini-app overview metadata pattern.
items: Protected medicine, schedule, dose-log, and note workflow.
